news_items.headline: Blue Jays' Cease loses no-hit bid vs. Giants in 9t...
news_items.summary: The Blue Jays' Dylan Cease took a no-hitter into the ninth inning Wednesday before the Giants' Heliot Ramos broke it up a line-drive single to center field.

news_items.headline: Mattingly interested in managing Phillies full tim...
news_items.summary: With the Phillies firmly in playoff contention heading into the All-Star break, interim manager Don Mattingly said he would be interested in leading the club full time.

news_items.headline: Rockies' Acevedo tests positive, gets 80-game ban
news_items.summary: Domingo Acevedo, a major league veteran pitching with Colorado's Triple-A team, got an 80-game ban for a positive PED test under the minor league drug program.

news_items.headline: Regan, ex-MLB pitcher and coach, dies at age 89
news_items.summary: Phil Regan, a former major league pitcher and longtime pitching coach, has died at age 89.

news_items.headline: Yankees make history, strike out 17 times again
news_items.summary: In a 6-4 loss to the Rays on Tuesday night, the Yankees whiffed 17 times to become the first team in American League history to hit that mark in consecutive nine-inning games.

news_items.headline: Royals' Caglianone to flex muscle in HR Derby
news_items.summary: Royals slugger Jac Caglianone, who hit nine of his 14 homers in June and is tied for the MLB lead in average HR distance, will participate in the Home Run Derby.

news_items.headline: 'Time has come': Verlander to retire after season
news_items.summary: Three-time Cy Young winner and 2011 American League MVP Justin Verlander, the oldest active player in the major leagues at 43, will retire after the 2026 season.

news_items.headline: WPBL unveils nicknames, logos for 1st season
news_items.summary: The Women's Professional Baseball League on Wednesday unveiled the nicknames and logos of its four teams ahead of its inaugural season, with each team name inspired by pioneering women.

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Milwaukee Brewers Wednesday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals will play the 4th game of their 5-game series this week versus the Milwaukee Brewers Wednesday night. Birthday boy Michael McGreevy will get the start for St. Louis while Milwaukee will give the ball to Kyle Harrison who’s 8-1 on the season with a 2.82 ERA. First pitch is scheduled for […]

news_items.headline: Mike Trout returns from IL to Angels lineup, back on track to play in first All-Star Game since 2019
news_items.summary: Trout was selected to play in the Midsummer Classic during the 2021-23 seasons, but injuries kept him out of the event those years.
